summary: Highly satisfied with the 450X performance and the smooth booking process.
Great family scooter (Rizta). Waiting for delivery.
Charging issue on day 3. Support response was slow.

comment: Customer asked about the 450X 30% discount offer. He is interested in the Space Grey color and wants a test ride scheduled for tomorrow.
